title: Junior Inventory Specialist / Inventory Specialist
required_skills: Completed vocational training as logistics specialist (Fachkraft Lagerlogistik) or relevant logistics experience
Sound knowledge of logistics processes and workflows
Experience with a warehouse management system (preferably SAP S/4HANA)
Good MS Office skills, especially Excel
bonus_skills: Technical background (career changers with technical background welcome)
matched_skills: MS Excel proficiency — satisfies Excel requirement
Fluent English (C1) — satisfies English language requirement
missing_skills: No logistics or warehousing experience — this is the core operational requirement
No SAP S/4HANA (or any ERP/WMS) experience
No completed vocational training in logistics (Berufsausbildung Fachkraft Lagerlogistik)
No physical inventory management, goods receiving, or warehouse operations experience
No forklift or floor conveyor vehicle operation experience
No goods labelling, parts cataloguing, or shipping/receiving process experience
core_responsibilities: Goods receiving and incoming goods inspection according to company standards
Booking inventory changes in SAP S/4HANA warehouse management system
Recording, labelling, and marking various parts
Timely goods dispatch based on parts lists and warehouse orders
Transport and loading/unloading of materials with floor conveyor vehicles
Packing work and support with shipping processing
Orderly storage and reorganisation of warehouse materials
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable — do not apply
This is a manual warehouse operations role requiring physical logistics experience, SAP WMS skills, and vocational training that the candidate does not possess
The candidate is significantly overqualified in terms of education and professional seniority but underqualified in the specific operational domain
summary: Poor match at 16.7%. This is a hands-on warehouse/inventory operations role requiring vocational logistics training, SAP S/4HANA experience, and physical goods handling competencies. The candidate has none of these. Additionally, the candidate's professional seniority and academic background make this a significant step down. Not recommended for application.
